name: Hedori - Modern Fantasy RPG (With Unique power System)
description:
!!THIS BOT IS LONG OUTDATED, I MADE A REMASTERED FULLY FUNCTIONAL VERSION, DO CHECK IT OUT, IF IT GETS ENOUGH TRACTION I'LL UPDATE IT!!

New bot:

https://janitorai.com/characters/fed01fe3-ad6e-4aff-948f-8d7023a955fb_character-hedoria-modern-fantasy-rpg-beta

Hedori, Once Your Cliche Medieval Fantasy Land, Where Magic And Sorcery Exist in the form of Sorinry because calling it sorcery made the LLM give them staffs in the 21st century, Sorinry Isn't what you expect out of your Average power system

Sorinry is A Complicated system for the average J.ai Doomscroller and their fried brains, it's main building block is Resonance, which is the placeholder name for Mana until i find a good term that doesn't cause the fucking LLM to think we're all gandalf the grey, Resonance is the source of energy of a sorin, it allows him massive physical bonuses and most importantly, allows them to use their techniques

Techniques are the Center Of Sorinry, they've existed for as long as intelligent life has existed, They're Innate abilities that A person is born with, similar to the Cursed Technique's from JJK cause this bot has too much Tokens already, except there's two types of techniques:

Elemental Techniques: Obvious, these are the more ancient ones, but in some cases aren't very valued depending on the element, they're passed down between the major clans

Rite Techniques: these are usually either Very lethal or very useless, a Rite technique usually manifests in the User based on A strong aspect of their life, could be a trauma, a profession, or even a personality trait, Rite techniques are usually more young, and don't get passed down for generations, like a recessive genetic feature, they can skip generations before appearing in an individual that alligns with the needed conditions

Now that we got that out of the way, back to Hedori, Hedori Has now Progressed into the Modern Era, The Previous Borders Between races and Ethnic Groups are long eroded after Their Unification Under One Constitutional Monarchy After the Great war (This worlds Equivalent of WW2, this isn't written into the bot because the tokens are already too high, but might add it later), The Lands Mostly enjoyed the Fruits of Peace, Which are mostly Capitalism And Shitpost memes with the Appearance of the Internet, Developing Technologically over the past 100 years until our modern day, all the schools of sorinry were unified under one Organization Funded and Regulated directly by the new world government, This Organization is Overlooked By 3 Mysterious Individuals Known as the Higher ups, Who aren't exactly very popular due to being overly conservative and suppressing any form of change, so unsurprisingly not everyone was eager to join this new world order, giving us Rogue Sorins

Rogue Sorins are Essentially Sorin Militias and State Labeled terrorist Organizations that don't Wish to Join This new order For Political, Ideological And Religious Reasons, There are Mainly 3 Ideological And Political groups Of Rogue Sorins, They are:

The Theocrats: Essentially Want to rule using Nearly extinct folk Religion, Establish a theocracy, they're known to conduct Very brutal Attacks on crowded civilians Areas

The Elevars: they want to ethnically cleanse any Non Sorin and build a society ruled
creator: Zukioman2000
